rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ENEZ ANITA BESSARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Neither a petition for final distribution nor a petition for approval of a report of status of administration has been filed. The minutes of the previous two hearings on 02/16/2022 and 05/02/2022 indicate that counsel for the personal representative was directed by the judicial officer to file a petition for approval of a report of status of administration if the estate was not ready to be closed. Counsel has not complied with the judicial officer's directive for the past four months. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 11th Amended General Order which took effect on 04/25/2022 and LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LAI CHUN YAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: hearing. apperance required. Probate Code 12200 requires estates close within 12 months if no 706 is due. if the estate cannot close on time, a petiiton to approve status of administration and request for additional time to administer estate must be filed. a declarastion requesting additional time is not sufficient. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 11th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 11th amended general order

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE YANG SU CHO 2015 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/01/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Petitioner alleges venue is San Francisco based on domicile of Decedent. Venue appears to be based on Probate Code 17002. Please explain how the court can determine notice to trustee Kyung Ja Kim is proper when the Affidavit of Due Diligence appears to show Kyung Ja Kim does not lived at the alleged address 1496 Silver Ave, San Francisco, CA 94134 and it appears the last address was in LA which appears according to Probate Code 17002 that LA would be the proper venue. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT A. THELEEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/01/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Examiner received unfiled copies of notice and declaration of robert j. silverman which have all been recycled. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BETTY TAYLOR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to july 25, 2022 (first available date) for the following issues: (1) the supplement must be verified by the petitioner, as the exception allowing an attorney to verify a pleading does not apply when the petitioner is seeking appointment as a fiduciary in the proceeding (CRC 7.103(c)); (2) the supplement must be served with a Notice of Hearing form that contains the continued hearing date and court information, as it changes the value of the estate from $50,000 to $2,000,000, a material change. the POS of the NOH must show at least 15 days notice. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.
